---
title: "🏈 NFL Elo Rankings"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    fig-align: center
    page-layout: full
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
echo: false
---

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
# load required packages
library(dplyr)
library(gt)
library(nflreadr)
```


```{r}
#| echo: false
# Load data
elo <- readRDS("final_elo.rds")

# Add logos
logos <- load_teams() %>%
  select(team_abbr, team_name, team_logo_espn)

elo_table <- elo %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number()) %>%
  left_join(logos, by = c("team" = "team_abbr"))

# Build table
elo_table %>%
  select(rank, team_logo_espn, team_name, rating) %>%
  gt() %>%
  text_transform(
    locations = cells_body(columns = team_logo_espn),
    fn = function(x) web_image(x, height = 30)
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    rank = "Rank",
    team_logo_espn = "",
    team_name = "Team",
    rating = "Elo Rating"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = rating,
    decimals = 2,
    use_seps = FALSE
  ) %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "NFL Elo Rankings",
    subtitle = paste("Updated:", Sys.Date())
  )
```
